Project Liberty 2029 Wiki

Here you will find a blueprint for restoring the foundations of Liberty and Justice, and for
dedicating ourselves to the proposition that a Nation so founded shall not perish from this earth.

Videos & Essays on Substack  
Support This on Patreon  
Help Improve This On GitHub  


Table of Contents
  • Overview
    • Main Phases:
      • Phase 1: Winning
      • Phase 2: Reforming
      • Phase X: Miscellaneous
    • All Pages
      • Pages by Folders
      • Pages by Doc Title
      • Pages by FileName

Homepage

Overview

There are two main phases of ProjectLiberty2029: not just for this version under this name, but for all of us who want to defeat fascism in America and restore Liberty and Justice for All.

Whatever name that has, it will have two phases:

First, we must win back control of the Federal Government by 2029.

Second, once fascists have been removed from power, we must make structural reforms to restore Liberty, to restore the Rule of Law, and to hold accountable those who aided and prosecuted the fascist agenda of misery and despair and moral shame that is now running rampant across our Nation.

This main index page has six sections.

The first three correspond to those two stages: winning back control of the government, and then the priorities and methods to use government to restore our Nation. There is also an "uncategorized" page of material that may help in the cause: lyrics, for example.

The last three are means to see on this index all the documents contained here on the ProjectLiberty2029 Wiki: One is by folder structure. One is by the internal title of each document (this is what displays when you visit that page). One is by the filename of each document.

Main Phases:

Phase 1: Winning

This is sorted by 10 stages between when this project began in Summer 2025 and January 20th, 2029.

    Stage 0: Starting
  • Draft Status Indicators for Pages
  • Stages Defined
  • Getting Started Contributing
    • Stage 1: Define the Fight
  • Military Priorities
  • Defining The Fight
    • Stage 2: Before Midterms
  • Before the Election Preparing for Election Theft
  • Before the Election: Secretary of State Battles
  • Testing third level directory
  • Before the 2028 Presidential Election
    • Stage 3: First Lame Duck
  • First Lame Duck Session Dangers
    • Stage 4: 120th Congress Year 1
  • 120th Congress Year One
    • Stage 5: Presidential Primaries
  • Presidential Primaries
    • Stage 6: General Election
  • The Coming Constitutional Hack
  • Getting Elected Landing Page
  • Possible Cabinet Appointees
    • Stage 7: Post Election Limbo
  • Defending the Election, Stage 1: DC and the National Guard
  • Defending the Election: Stage 1: Dec 19 Certification
  • Defending the Election Overview
    • Stage 8: Pre Jan 3rd
  • January 3rd Concerns
    • Stage 9: Pre Jan 6th
  • January 6th Concerns
    • Stage 10: Pre Jan 20th
  • Defending the Election Post Jan 6th

Phase 2: Reforming

    Stage 11 = Phase 2: Post Jan 20th
  • Rename DOGE to ROLA
  • Overview of Needed Executive Action
  • Banishment and Probation Rooms
  • Replacing ICE
  • Legislation and Constitutional Amendments
  • Legislative Branch Budget Priorities
  • Separate Justice Branch
  • The Share ReadMe
  • Post Jan 30th Landing Page.

Phase X: Miscellaneous

    Stage 12 = Phase x: Miscellaneous
  • Lyrics to: Battle Hymn for Fair And Share
  • Lyrics to: Yankee Doodle Went to Vote
  • Lyrics to: O Beautiful, The Policy
  • Miscellaneous Pages

All documents formatted and/or identified as Legislation are hereby donated to the public domain.
All authors of such material on this site are hereby notified that work on Legislation shall be in the public domain.
Thank you for your service!

In the case of documents, unless otherwise noted in the document's header, footer, or front-matter, they may be assumed to be shared under a CC 4.0 BY-SA deed.

In the case of other file types (images, pdfs, etc) check the directory containing the file for a licensing text file. Without explicit permissions, all such files should be assumed to be all rights reserved.

For CC 4.0 SA-BY, the suggested attribution is: "Created by {author's names if known} for ProjectLiberty2029.com and ProjectLiberty2029.github.io

Content included under "Source Documents" may be of mixed copyright status. Use caution before copying.
If you learn of items that we should remove, please open an issue, explain the copyright, and we will remove asap.
